emails.subject: Deal 453938.01
emails.body: Deal 453938.01 Hello- Diana Scholtes 11/08 Enron Sells Idaho 99.50 Mid C We have term 11/10-11/11/2000 Bloomberg has term 11/13-11/30-2000 please let me know thanks
